title: callicarpa phuluangensis
intro: Callicarpa phuluangensis, also known as the Purple Fruit Bush, is a flowering plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to Thailand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties. In traditional Thai medicine, Callicarpa phuluangensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to treat various ailments, showcasing its versatility in herbal preparations.
